The space

A corner worth
staying in.

High ceilings, warm light, and seats made for lingering.

"Coffee, culture, conversation — that's the whole menu, really."

Our story

Started with one machine
and a folding table.

"We wanted Obs to have a coffee shop that felt like it belonged here — not imported, not trying too hard."

Lumen opened in 2023 in a small corner unit on Lower Main Road. We roast in small batches, change our pour-over selection weekly, and know most of our regulars by name. That's the whole philosophy, really.

Find us

Come sit a while.
